name: Andy Nelsen

body:
Andy,

It seems like running SaaS tools built for accounting firms means your QA has to hold a precision standard that users actually notice. A broken workflow during tax season carries real stakes for the firms running on your platform.

I sent a note last week about test cycles for accounting platforms, but wanted to follow up with a different angle.

One of our customers, CRED, automated 90% of their regression at 5x the speed. It made me think of what your team is probably navigating around release confidence at Rightworks.

Is getting through regression fast enough the harder part, or is it more about coverage depth before a release ships?
